cases.precondition: event store and task snapshot are absent
cases.injection_point: open or any other repo-local command
cases.expected: only open may create a native v3 genesis; other task commands report no task

cases.precondition: event store is absent and task snapshot has schema 2
cases.expected: fail closed with LEGACY_STATE_UNSUPPORTED and do not mutate either artifact

cases.precondition: event store is absent and task snapshot has schema 3
cases.expected: fail closed with ORPHAN_V3_SNAPSHOT and never promote the snapshot to authority

cases.precondition: event store is valid and snapshot is absent, invalid, or behind
cases.expected: recover from genesis or the verified source cursor without using snapshot as authority

cases.precondition: event store is valid and snapshot has schema 2 or an unknown schema
cases.injection_point: ordinary command before explicit side-artifact archive
cases.expected: fail closed with MIXED_OR_INVALID_AUTHORITY and leave event-store bytes unchanged

cases.precondition: event store has internal corruption and any snapshot is present
cases.expected: fail closed with CORRUPT_EVENT_AUTHORITY and never fall back to snapshot

cases.precondition: a legacy process writes schema-2 task.json beside a valid v3 event store
cases.expected: classify as mixed authority, preserve the event-store digest, and perform no mutation

cases.precondition: installer is activating runtime contract 4
cases.injection_point: runtime-staged, skills-activated, shim-activated, or manifest-committed failpoint
cases.expected: stable shim resolves to one complete old or runtime-4 release and never a partial release

cases.precondition: empty repository
cases.expected: event store remains absent and repository authority remains empty

cases.precondition: empty repository
cases.injection_point: short write or process termination during genesis temporary write
cases.expected: authority file remains absent and residual temporary bytes are never authority

cases.precondition: complete genesis temporary file has been fsynced
cases.injection_point: after temporary fsync and before rename
cases.expected: authority file remains absent and recovery never promotes the temporary file

cases.precondition: complete genesis temporary file has been renamed
cases.injection_point: after rename and before directory sync
cases.expected: process-crash recovery observes only a complete new genesis

cases.precondition: valid event store exists
cases.expected: recovery returns the complete old state

cases.precondition: valid event store exists
cases.injection_point: append returns a short write, zero progress, or an exception
cases.expected: command fails and recovery treats only the incomplete final fragment as a partial tail

cases.precondition: valid event store exists
cases.injection_point: parent terminates child in the middle of an appended record
cases.expected: raw tail is quarantined before truncation and recovery returns the complete old state

cases.precondition: a complete newline-terminated record was written
cases.injection_point: after write and before event-file fsync
cases.expected: recovery returns either the complete old state or complete new state and never a partial transaction

cases.precondition: new record has been fsynced
cases.injection_point: after event fsync and before snapshot replacement
cases.expected: event stream is authoritative and replay returns the complete new state

cases.precondition: new event transaction is committed
cases.injection_point: snapshot temporary write or snapshot rename failure
cases.expected: command remains committed with a warning and replay reconstructs the complete new state

cases.precondition: repo transaction is committed
cases.injection_point: HOME outcome append or HOME cursor update failure
cases.expected: repo state does not roll back and sync-outcomes later converges without duplicate rows

cases.precondition: partial tail quarantine and receipt are durable but source truncation is pending
cases.expected: next recovery reuses or deduplicates quarantine and truncates without losing original tail evidence

cases.precondition: event store ends with a fragment lacking newline
cases.expected: quarantine the final fragment, truncate to the last complete record, and recover prior state

cases.precondition: a newline-terminated record contains invalid JSON or an unknown field
cases.expected: fail closed and leave the original event store unchanged

cases.precondition: a record or event digest is invalid
cases.expected: fail closed and leave the original event store unchanged

cases.precondition: repo or task event sequence has a gap or regression
cases.expected: fail closed and leave the original event store unchanged

cases.precondition: previous-record digest does not match the prior record
cases.expected: fail closed and leave the original event store unchanged

cases.precondition: task A snapshot is behind and task_opened for B is committed
cases.expected: verify A at its own cursor and replay through B without reporting mixed authority

cases.precondition: snapshot cursor is ahead or its source digest or identity is invalid
cases.expected: fail closed and never use the snapshot as authority

cases.precondition: event store is valid and snapshot is absent, invalid JSON, or has a bad self-digest
cases.expected: retain diagnostics and rebuild the snapshot from event-store genesis

cases.precondition: tally event is fsynced and snapshot is stale
cases.injection_point: retry the same hook payload after process termination
cases.expected: output token delta is applied exactly once

cases.precondition: tally event is committed
cases.injection_point: delete snapshot and retry the same range
cases.expected: cursor replays from events and no second tally event is produced

cases.precondition: authoritative transcript cursor exists
cases.injection_point: submit a duplicate, overlapping, or regressing range
cases.expected: reducer and audit fail closed without increasing token spend

cases.precondition: transcript contains UTF-8, CRLF, and a final incomplete line
cases.expected: advance Buffer byte offsets only through the last complete 0x0A-terminated line

cases.precondition: transcript path is truncated, replaced, or fails anchor validation
cases.expected: open a new generation with zero-delta baseline and never guess missing tokens

cases.precondition: owner PreToolUse reads a new complete range but final adjudication denies the write
cases.expected: commit only output_tokens_tallied, emit no write_authorized event, and preserve deny stdout bytes

cases.precondition: repository path contains spaces, Unicode, and drive-letter case variants
cases.injection_point: genesis temporary write, fsync, rename, and replay
cases.expected: all four Windows CI combinations produce one normalized repository authority

cases.precondition: event record is fsynced on a real Windows file
cases.expected: replay returns the complete new state

cases.precondition: Windows event store has a partial final record
cases.injection_point: mid-record termination and repeated C12 recovery
cases.expected: quarantine is durable and repeated recovery converges without losing tail evidence

cases.precondition: task A snapshot exists and task B opening event is committed
cases.expected: R06 replay reaches task B without a mixed-authority false positive

cases.precondition: twenty Node processes target one repository
cases.injection_point: concurrent mutations under the repo lock
cases.expected: repo sequence is continuous with no duplicate or lost mutation

cases.precondition: task lock is stale
cases.injection_point: recovery process acquires the lock and then terminates
cases.expected: subsequent recovery converges without two simultaneous lock owners

cases.precondition: Windows transcript contains UTF-8 and CRLF
cases.injection_point: range read followed by truncate or replacement
cases.expected: byte offsets remain exact and replacement starts a zero-delta generation

cases.precondition: event file is durable and parent-directory fsync capability is probed
cases.expected: only exact fixture-listed unsupported codes degrade with a receipt; all other errors fail closed

cases.precondition: fixed-seed 10001-record production dataset after one warm-up
cases.expected: every full replay completes below 200 milliseconds on the recorded environment

cases.precondition: fixed-seed production dataset is fully replayed
cases.injection_point: one hundred single-record incremental tail reads
cases.expected: incremental tail-read P95 remains below 5 milliseconds on the recorded environment

cases.precondition: fixed-seed production store is on the measured filesystem
cases.injection_point: fifty append plus event-file fsync operations
cases.expected: append-plus-fsync P95 remains below 20 milliseconds on the recorded environment

cases.precondition: all performance samples have completed
cases.expected: receipt records environment, raw samples, P50, P95, maximum, thresholds, and a non-fabricated pass decision
